block_03: Things are starting to heat up as traders are competing for the top ranks to get a share of the $5000 cash prize and to win the title of the №1 trader in Asia.
block_04: The 2nd round begins in a few days, on July 6 — now is not the time to take a break, now is the time to pump up those numbers and show the other traders you didn’t just come here for the weather!
block_06: From June 29-August 2, 2020, we hold 4 free tournaments, each lasting a week. Each free tournament has up to 20 winners who will get a ticket to the Final Battle with the $5000 prize fund.
block_07: Will you win one of the lucky tickets?
block_10: 20 tickets to the “Final Battle” tournament
